emergency_definition: Complete HVAC failure in a medical facility or server room
Building temperature is unsafe for occupants (below 60°F or above 90°F)
Any HVAC failure in a data center

step_1.callback_guarantee: Callback within 30 minutes for medical facilities and server rooms, and 60 minutes for all others

call_transfer_rules.if_no_answer: Callback within 30 minutes for medical facilities and server rooms, and 60 minutes for all others

integration_constraints: Do not quote any prices to callers
after_hours_flow_summary: Callers will be routed through the emergency line
office_hours_flow_summary: Calls will be transferred to the main office
special_rules: Immediate escalation to Ingrid at 612-555-0200 if caller identifies as calling from North Memorial Health or Children's Minnesota
greeting: Nordic HVAC Solutions, commercial comfort specialists
notes: Nordic HVAC Solutions requires initial triage before routing emergency calls
